ofm.title: OnlyMonster dominating OFM AI tools
ofm.summary: — Became the go-to management system with advanced AI assistance for chatting, fan management, and agency operations. Pure word-of-mouth growth during Beta. [onlymonster.ai](https://onlymonster.ai/)

ofm.title: Fanvue AI models hitting $38K/month
ofm.summary: — One creator reported an AI model generating $38,328.60 in 30 days. Platform has built-in AI messaging, voice notes, and analytics. 20% commission, $5-9.99 sweet spot pricing. [fanvue.com](https://www.fanvue.com/pages/fanvue-ai)

ofm.title: AI girlfriend market now $2.91B
ofm.summary: — Growing 25.2% CAGR, 50M+ active users globally. $120 ARPU annually, 93% retention (7% monthly churn). [jenova.ai](https://www.jenova.ai/en/resources/ai-roleplay-girlfriend)

ofm.title: OnlyFans AI policy tightened
ofm.summary: — New 2026 detection tools for AI-generated content and deepfakes. Agencies need transparency protocols now. [sirency.com](https://www.sirency.com/blog/onlyfans-policy-updates-2026-ai-deepfakes-and-rules)

ofm.title: Supercreator major competitor
ofm.summary: — Full AI-powered CRM for OFM agencies with chatting automation and team management. [supercreator.app](https://www.supercreator.app/)

tools.title: OpenClaw v2026.3.7-beta.1 released
tools.summary: — Major ContextEngine plugin interface added, 200+ bugs fixed. Memory can now be freely plugged/unplugged. [36kr.com](https://eu.36kr.com/en/p/3715160552878469)

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.2.26: production-ready
tools.summary: — Added secrets system, safer defaults, browser control, multi-DM, and Android support. Moving from "demo" to daily ops tool. [reddit.com](https://www.reddit.com/r/LocalLLM/comments/1rimve1/new_openclaw_release_version_2026226_way_less/)

tools.title: CrewAI leading multi-agent platform
tools.summary: — Open-source orchestration framework with high-level abstractions for complex agent workflows. [crewai.com](https://crewai.com/)

tools.title: n8n.io for AI workflow automation
tools.summary: — Visual builder with MCP support, on-prem deployment, human-in-the-loop approvals. Strong for legacy system integration. [n8n.io](https://n8n.io/)

tools.title: CLAUDE.md pattern emerging
tools.summary: — Standard practice: root-level file providing context, constraints, architecture guidance for AI coding sessions. [medium.com](https://henriquesd.medium.com/claude-code-a-practical-guide-to-automating-your-development-workflow-675714db08ed)

market.title: Puerto Escondido rental market strong
market.summary: — 2026 showing growing international demand, improved infrastructure, year-round occupancy. Airport expanding with additional US/Canada routes planned. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-rental-market-analysis-2026-occupancy-trends-investment-outlook)

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competition
market.summary: — Competitors at $55-85/day (TulumTours.com, TulumAreaExperiences). Lagoon Company positioned well with yacht bundling. Differentiation critical.

market.title: Rammed earth advancing fast
market.summary: — Earth USA 2026 conference Sept 18-20 Santa Fe. Robotic ramming + digitally controlled compaction now viable. Prefab block approach reduces cost/time. [earthusa.org](https://www.earthusa.org) [eartharchitecture.org](https://eartharchitecture.org/)

market.title: Fixer-uppers hot in Puerto Escondido
market.summary: — Informed investors targeting renovation projects. Hidden gem opportunities before full development wave hits. [realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/fixer-upper-properties-in-puerto-escondido-investment-opportunities-on-oaxacas-pacific-coast)
